{"id": 5, "row_id": null, "summary": "Inserted: {"folder": "INBOX", "sender": "margaret.sullivan@brookfieldcpas.com", "cc_json": "[\"andrea.phil@brookfieldcpas.com\"]", "content": "Hi Jones,\n\nI need to flag something before we lock the May close.", "operation": "INSERT", "timestamp": "2026-06-10T16:03:50.593072+00:00", "table_name": "emails", "schema_name": "email", "changed_fields": {"folder": "INBOX", "sender": "margaret.sullivan@brookfieldcpas.com", "cc_json": "["andrea.phil@brookfieldcpas.com"]", "content": "Hi Jones,

I need to flag something before we lock the May close. We finalized the Acme platform renewal last month and the annual contract is $1.2M effective April 1. Per ASC 606 we should be recognizing that ratably over the service period. I uploaded the executed agreement to your document vault but I have not seen the deferred revenue schedule updated to reflect the new contract value.

Can you confirm whether the DR schedule in the May close package picks up the revised contract amount, or if we need a true-up entry before Andrea signs off? The old contract was $960K annual so the monthly delta is about $20K that might be sitting unrecognized.

I know things are hectic with the close but this could affect the certification if the revenue recognition is understated for May.

Thanks,
Margaret", "is_read": true, "subject": "Acme platform renewal - deferred revenue schedule update needed before May close", "email_id": "e7c4a2f9301d48b6a5f82e3c1d9b47a0", "parent_id": null, "timestamp": "2026-06-09T16:35:00+00:00", "keywords_json": "{}", "recipients_json": "["jones.harrison@brookfieldcpas.com"]", "attachments_json": "{}"}}

{"id": 12, "row_id": "linear_c7a4e91f8b23", "summary": "Inserted: {\"id\": \"linear_c7a4e91f8b23\", \"title\": \"AP autoroute correction needed: Datadog invoices still routing to 500000 for acme_cloud after May reclass\", \"number\": 3116, \"team_id\": \"linear_5477c0808ac2\", \"c", "operation": "INSERT", "timestamp": "2026-06-10T16:03:50.593072+00:00", "table_name": "linear_issues", "schema_name": "linear", "changed_fields": {"id": "linear_c7a4e91f8b23", "title": "AP autoroute correction needed: Datadog invoices still routing to 500000 for acme_cloud after May reclass", "number": 3116, "team_id": "linear_5477c0808ac2", "cycle_id": null, "due_date": "2026-06-12", "estimate": 3, "priority": 2, "state_id": null, "parent_id": null, "created_at": "2026-06-03T16:00:00Z", "links_json": "[]", "project_id": "linear_63697b7dff5c", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T14:30:00Z", "assignee_id": "linear_2e7b3ea28766", "description": "Datadog vendor invoices have been auto-routing to 500000 (Cost of Revenue) instead of 521000 (Engineering Tools & Observability) across FY25 for acme_cloud.
